test_scenarios.given: A CloudFront distribution with S3 origin that has origin_access_control_id configured and references an OAC with origin_access_control_origin_type='s3'
A CloudFront distribution with S3 origin but no origin_access_control_id configured
A CloudFront distribution with non-S3 origin (custom origin)
A CloudFront distribution with multiple origins including S3 origin with OAC configured
